ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit for the year (in millions) */,
  "profit_d" REAL /* Profit from domestic sources (in millions) */,
  "profit_f" REAL /* Profit from foreign sources (in millions) */,
  "propinc_nonfarm" REAL /* Proprietorship income from non-farm sectors (in millions) */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Inventory levels (in millions) */,
  "fi_nonres" REAL /* Financial investments in non-residential (in millions) */,
  "fi_res" REAL /* Financial investments in residential (in millions) */,
  "pce" REAL /* Personal consumption expenditures (in millions) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region identifier */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector identifier */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source identifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data entry was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating or flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter within the year */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month within the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for profit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "profit_d" REAL /* Profit from domestic sources (in millions) */,
  "profit_f" REAL /* Profit from foreign sources (in millions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the profit entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the profit entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profits_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income type */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of income (e.g., domestic, foreign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the income type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the income type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for investment entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "fi_nonres" REAL /* Financial investments in non-residential (in millions) */,
  "fi_res" REAL /* Financial investments in residential (in millions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the investment entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the investment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_expenditures" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for consumption entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "pce" REAL /* Personal consumption expenditures (in millions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the consumption entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the consumption entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_expenditures_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_data" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Inventory levels (in millions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for trend entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trend entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trend entry was last updated */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the observed trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the observed trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_trends_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the external source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the external source entry was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic_data entry */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line graph, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
